name: Plum Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the suet, sugar, and bread crumbs together.
2. Add the beaten eggs and beat until combined.
3. Sift together all the dry ingredients (flour, spices, baking soda, salt).
4. Combine the raisins, currants, nuts, and fruit peel in a separate bowl.
5. Sprinkle half of the sifted dry ingredients over the fruit mixture.
6. Add orange juice to the suet mixture; then add milk alternately with the remaining dry ingredients.
7. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are well incorporated.
8. Stir in the combined fruits.
9. Fill greased pudding molds about halfway full.
10. Cover tightly and steam for 3 hours.
11. Serve with any desired pudding sauce.
